title: OrganiGram Holdings (OGI) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: OrganiGram Holdings Q3 2022 Earnings Results. Revenue Growth: Gross revenue grew 90% from Q3 2021 to CAD55.2 million and net revenue grew 88% to CAD38.1 million. Revenue increases were primarily due to higher recreational net revenue, which grew 105% from Q3 of the prior year. Production & Harvesting: The company harvested approximately 13,000 kilos of flower during Q3 fiscal 2022 compared to about 8,400 kilograms in the prior year's comparison period, an increase of 57%. Profitability: On an adjusted basis, gross margin was CAD9.3 million or 24% compared to a negative 4% in Q3 of fiscal 2021. The company achieved a positive adjusted EBITDA of CAD583,000 compared to a negative CAD9.2 million in Q3 2021. Operating Expenses: SG&A, excluding non-cash share-based compensation, increased to CAD17.5 million in Q3 2022 from CAD12.3 million in the prior year's comparison quarter. Outlook: The company expected to increase adjusted EBITDA in Q4 of fiscal 2022 based on its outlook for revenues, including growth from the Canadian recreational market and international sales and reduced cost of production from efficiency gains. Earnings call held July 14, 2022.
